use_cases: Displaying user profile avatars in testimonial and review sections
Showing customer profile images in testimonial cards
Building social proof components for landing pages
Creating client showcase sections for business websites
Adding profile images to review and feedback interfaces
ai_summary: A testimonial card component using Radix UI Avatar primitives for displaying user profile images in customer testimonial sections. Features minimal flat design with standard rounded avatar styling, suitable for building social proof and review sections across SaaS and e-commerce platforms.
